sourceMovie.title: How Much Do You Love Me?
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: How Much Do You Love Me? works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Three Colors: White
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If How Much Do You Love Me? clicked for you, Three Colors: White (1994) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after How Much Do You Love Me??
faq.answer: Try Three Colors: White, Samba, Stolen Kisses—each shares DNA with How Much Do You Love Me? while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is How Much Do You Love Me??
faq.answer: How Much Do You Love Me? (2005) is best described as Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is How Much Do You Love Me? worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
